description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch and can be triggered manually. The workflow should use an ubuntu-18.04 runner and skip if the commit message contains 'ci-skip'. It checks out the source tree, installs and verifies GCC 7, caches Bazel artifacts, sets up bazelisk, verifies the Bazel version, runs Bazel tests with sandbox debug and verbose failures, and applies a caching workaround.
